name: Yukime
description:
__Race:__ Therianthrope (Fox)

She is the ruler of the White Tower, a therianthrope known as a "Spirit Fox". Even Among the Spirit Fox clan she possesses exceptional talents and combat abilities, using an iron fan as her weapon to dance gracefully in battle. While she manages the red-light district in the Lawless City, she is also a savvy entrepreneur who runs a trading company called the Snow Fox Corporation

~!Later on, Yukime chooses to form an alliance between her faction and [Shadow's](https://anilist.co/character/136837/Cid-Kagenou), both organizations desiring to end the nuisance of the cult.!~
